markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review AI search performance and align on conversion-focused initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI Search Performance:** Strong on Google/Perplexity, but near-zero on ChatGPT. This is a critical gap, as ChatGPT is the most-used platform.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**Conversion Strategy:** Prioritize use case pages to improve a low 3-conversion/month rate. GrowthX will wireframe new pages to support Jessica's plan for a higher SEM budget.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Operational Issues:** A batch of new content is not indexing, and recent staging errors were caused by a team change. GrowthX is investigating and resolving both.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)

## Topics

### AI Search Performance

  - [**Strong Performance on Google & Perplexity:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - ["SMS-based employee communication platform" is the top-ranked prompt by visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [Citation share is \>20% for key content, a strong signal of authority.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [Perplexity cites Yourco as a "workforce intelligence platform," reinforcing brand positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [**Critical Gap: ChatGPT Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [Performance is near-zero, despite Yourco's comparison content.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The free ChatGPT model uses an older internet crawl and may not see recent content.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Counterpoint:** Jessica confirmed the free model can access new content.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [**Action:** Carrie will investigate the cause of this discrepancy.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**New Opportunity: Longer Queries:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Google Search Console shows longer, more conversational queries, likely from AI Overviews and Gemini.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will analyze these queries to identify new content topics.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)

### Conversion Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Improve the low 3-conversion/month rate.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [**Jessica's Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [**Signup Form:** Launch a revised UX/UI this month to reduce friction (no field removal).](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [**SEM Budget:** Increase spend on "employee alerts" and "text off" use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Recommendations:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Use Case Pages:** Redesign for better conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
          - [**Action:** GrowthX will create wireframes for Jessica's review.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
          - [**Strategy:** Move long-form content to dedicated blog posts to preserve SEO keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [**Engagement Analysis:** Identify high-traffic, low-engagement pages for refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
      - [**CTAs:** Create dedicated CTA images for each core use case.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**Content Staging:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
      - [**Problem:** Recent staging delays were caused by a team change and a missed workflow handover.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [**Resolution:** The issue is fixed; the team is now ahead of schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [**Content Indexing:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
      - [**Problem:** A batch of new content is not indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will investigate, manually resubmit pages, and escalate if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Redirects:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Problem:** Two updated pages are causing SEMrush errors.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Status:** Not affecting indexing; GrowthX is aware.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [Investigate the cause of low ChatGPT visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [Analyze long-tail queries from Search Console for new content topics.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Create wireframes for the "employee alerts" and "text off" use case pages.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
      - [Identify high-traffic, low-engagement pages for refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
      - [Investigate and resolve the content indexing issue.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [Review and approve the use case page wireframes.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
      - [Create dedicated CTA images for core use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [Launch the revised signup form UX/UI this month.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [Update blog categorization in \~2 weeks, adding an AI summary widget.](https://fathom.video/share/KbgZDy38B8JGgD1fRkUz5crzAWV3uaLD?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
